summary: Verified critical fix: Items in groups are now computed INDIVIDUALLY, not merged into group leaders. The by_stamp dict correctly distributes items to their OWN stamps. Group display (is_group=True, members[]) works for Current Stock UI. All 8 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: stock_service.py _resolve() function correctly returns master_name only (NO group leader merging)
inventory_map is keyed by INDIVIDUAL item keys, not group leader keys
by_stamp dict built from all_computed items at INDIVIDUAL level - verified TULSI 70 -264 and TULSI 70 BELT both appear in STAMP 3
Group display entries (is_group=True) built in second pass AFTER individual computation - totals correctly sum members
approval-details endpoint uses by_stamp which now has individual items - book values are correct per item
seed_data_creation: None - used existing groups: SNT 40-256 (members: SNT 40-256, SNT-40 PREMIUM), TULSI 70 -264 (members: TULSI 70 -264, TULSI 70 BELT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical fix verified: Items are computed individually, not merged into groups. Groups are ONLY for display (expandable rows in Current Stock). Each item retains its own stamp assignment. STAMP 3 has both TULSI items as separate entries in by_stamp. Two STAMP 3 pending entries exist for testing approval workflow.

individual_stock_computation.description: Items computed at INDIVIDUAL level, not merged into group leaders
individual_stock_computation.evidence: by_stamp['STAMP 3'] contains both 'TULSI 70 -264' and 'TULSI 70 BELT' as separate items with different weights

by_stamp_individual_items.description: by_stamp distributes items to their OWN stamp (not group leader's stamp)
by_stamp_individual_items.evidence: API test confirmed SNT 40-256 and SNT-40 PREMIUM both appear in by_stamp['Unassigned']

group_display_with_members.description: inventory list shows grouped display with is_group=True and members[]
group_display_with_members.evidence: API returns groups with members array, UI shows expandable rows with group badge

group_totals_correct.description: Group display has correct totals (sum of individual members)
group_totals_correct.evidence: TULSI group gr_wt = sum of member gr_wt values

approval_details_individual_values.description: approval-details uses individual item book values from by_stamp
approval_details_individual_values.evidence: Comparison table shows individual items with their own book values

details_toggle.description: Details button toggles comparison table visibility (expand/collapse)
details_toggle.evidence: Playwright test: click 1 = expand (visible), click 2 = collapse (hidden), click 3 = re-expand (visible)

badge_loading_spinner.description: Loader2 spinner shows next to PENDING badge while delta is computed
badge_loading_spinner.evidence: Code review confirms badgeLoading state and Loader2 component

current_stock_loading_skeleton.description: Loading skeleton displays while inventory data loads
current_stock_loading_skeleton.evidence: Playwright test confirmed animate-pulse visible during load

expandable_group_rows.description: Current Stock page has expandable group rows
expandable_group_rows.evidence: Playwright test: 2 expand buttons found, clicking expands to show 2 member rows, clicking again collapses

db_indexes.description: Comprehensive DB indexes created on startup
db_indexes.evidence: Inventory endpoint responds in <5s (4.34s test run)
